allow: Bash(python -c "import starlette; print\(''starlette:'', starlette.__version__\); import fastapi; print\(''fastapi:'', fastapi.__version__\); import numpy; print\(''numpy:'', numpy.__version__\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); paths=[p for p in d[''paths''] if ''risk'' in p]; print\(''\\n''.join\(paths\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p\) for p in sorted\(d[''paths'']\) if ''risk'' in p or ''covariance'' in p or ''mst'' in p or ''greeks'' in p]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p\) for p in sorted\(d[''paths'']\) if any\(x in p for x in [''risk'',''covariance'',''mst'',''greeks'']\)]")
